# atlassian_jira_project_permission_scheme (Resource)

Assigns a permission scheme to a Jira Cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_project_permission_scheme" "example" {
  project_key = atlassian_jira_project.example.key
  scheme_id   = atlassian_jira_permission_scheme.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_key` (String) The key of the project. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.
- `scheme_id` (String) The ID of the permission scheme to assign to the project.
